full_text:
Yang Wei (Shiying) 楊偉 (世英)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Wei (楊偉), styledShiying (世英), was born in Fengyi. Military advisor to Cao Shuang. During Cao Shuang’s campaign in 244, he urged retreat, warning that the army would suffer a huge defeat otherwise. Yang Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
